title: Releasing Music article - write and refine as executing real steps

title: Add TRNG Deep Dive article as top article
description: Move 2026-02-20_TRNG_DEEP_DIVE.md into articles/ directory, adapt formatting for the site's custom markdown parser (no LaTeX, tables, blockquotes, or lists support), register in articles.json as the newest article, and verify it renders correctly when served locally.

title: Create image processing skill/script for photo gallery workflow
description: Create a Claude Code skill and/or shell script that automates the photo gallery image processing workflow: auto-orient JPEGs (EXIF + manual fixes), generate thumbnails from originals (512px, quality 85), generate photos.json manifest, sync originals to VPS, deploy thumbnails. Covers the full pipeline from raw camera photos to live gallery. Should handle both timbeach.com and posixparty.com galleries.
close_reason: Created gallery-process.sh script at ~/.local/bin/ and Claude Code skill at ~/.claude/skills/gallery-process/
